query: SELECT id, type, productCode, description, quantity, costPrice, totalPrice, isBundled, leadTimeDays, comments FROM line_items WHERE supplierQuoteId = 690002 ORDER BY itemNumber;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ro2tCDef8YTuRV.root --database 89sPt5WznQmH7pHfxEjFRd --execute SELECT id, type, productCode, description, quantity, costPrice, totalPrice, isBundled, leadTimeDays, comments FROM line_items WHERE supplierQuoteId = 690002 ORDER BY itemNumber;

rows.description: Globo 30 Hanging pendant IP20 Matt White finish polyethylene 1xE27 with 3m white power cable
Solis Low Profile LED downlight module, 9W, 3000k, 965lm, CR190 MacAdam3 Citzen LED, 200mA, 33-39V DC, 60Degree Lens, 22mm Height **Excludes Driver** Requires Solis Downlight Head.
HW - remove e27 lamp holder - install led module - program dali driver.
"Constant Current 20W 100ma-1050mA DALI Dimmable (ONE4ALL) Driver, L120 + W51 + H29mm, 5 year warranty" excluding flex and plug. (forward voltage min 7v to 44v)
Black Rod Accessory to suit Bubble Series; 1200mm x 12mmD; Requires 1 x L8BUPD06930
Custom flush mount canopy White finish 70mm Single central cable to suit pendants up to 3kg Cut out: 50mm Ceiling canopy to match rod colour tbc
Suspension Planter Light Aluminium + Acrylic diffuser Matt Black finish Dia 1200mm x H400mm LED Strip light 12W/M 3000K 24Vdc 220-240Vac DALI Dimmable - Remote Driver
Suspension Planter Light Aluminium + Acrylic diffuser Matt Black finish Dia 2000mm x H400mm LED Strip light 12W/M 3000K 24Vdc 220-240Vac DALI Dimmable - Remote Driver
Suspension Planter Light Aluminium + Acrylic diffuser Matt Black finish Dia 3000mm x H400mm LED Strip light 12W/M 3000K 24Vdc 220-240Vac DALI Dimmable - Remote Driver
Constant Voltage 100W 24V DALI Dimmable (ONE4ALL) Driver, 5 year warranty
Lumen8 on site installation direction; 1 representative, 1 day
Plant installation - Post hanging pot pendants
This amount shown is based on the quoted items and delivery location. Alterations to product, quantities or delivery location may result in freight charge variations.
Approximately 12-14 weeks from order, subject to change.
